title: Playground Project Tabs
concept: A tabbed project workspace for educators running workshops: multiple Playgrounds stay open as project tabs, while each project exposes Site, Files, Blueprints, Database, Logs, and Settings as IDE-like inner tabs.
focus: IDE-like file, code, and blueprint affordances
educator workshop launchpad and saved management
mobile bottom navigation for primary project sections
flows: Switch between saved, temporary, blueprint, and new Playground project tabs without leaving the workspace.
Use the first viewport to navigate the active WordPress path, refresh the embedded site, save temporary work, manage saved Playgrounds, and start common workshop sources.
Create Playgrounds from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured Blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Work inside project tabs for Site preview, File browser, Blueprint editor and gallery, Database tools, Logs, and runtime Settings.
Export to GitHub, download a Playground zip, copy or download Blueprint bundles, run Blueprints, and download database.sqlite.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save and Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
